# Veloria Grand Hotel

> A luxury independent hotel in Bandra West, Mumbai, offering 147 rooms and suites, fine dining, a rooftop pool, spa, and event spaces. Founded in 1998.

## Pages

- [Home](https://veloria-hotel.netlify.app/): Overview, room highlights, amenities, and booking bar
- [About](https://veloria-hotel.netlify.app/about.html): Hotel history, values, leadership team, awards, FAQ
- [Rooms & Packages](https://veloria-hotel.netlify.app/rooms.html): Deluxe Rooms, Junior Suites, Veloria Suites, Presidential Suites, and curated packages (Honeymoon, Weekend Luxe, Business Elite)
- [Gallery](https://veloria-hotel.netlify.app/gallery.html): Photos of rooms, facilities, dining, and events
- [Contact / Booking](https://veloria-hotel.netlify.app/contact.html): Booking form, address, phone, and email

## Key Facts

- Address: 12, Grand Palace Road, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
- Phone: +91 22 6789 0000
- Email: hello@veloriagrand.com
- Check-in: 2:00 PM / Check-out: 12:00 noon
- Reception: open 24 hours
